Derived From (scope step Output column): Scope Step 1 Input: account identifier used to query all data sources
Notes: Required input — the caller must supply this when invoking the flow

Derived From (scope step Output column): Scope Step 1 Input: human-readable account name used in report output and LLM prompts for context
Notes: Used in prompt context so the LLM can reference the account by name in analysis and report text

Derived From (scope step Output column): Scope Step 1 Input: time period for the review
Notes: Format: '2026-Q1'. Used to construct date ranges for API queries.

Derived From (scope step Output column): Scope Step 1 Output: account metadata from CRM (ARR / contract_end / renewal_date / account_tier / key contacts)
Notes: Single JSON object. Contains contract context used in synthesis and report generation. analyse_health uses account_tier for tier-contextualised evaluation.

Derived From (scope step Output column): Scope Step 2 Output: support ticket records from the support API
Notes: Reducer supports future fan-out if data gathering is split into parallel sub-actions. Each ticket dict contains fields like severity / status / created_date / resolution_time / CSAT.

Derived From (scope step Output column): Scope Step 3 Output: product usage metrics (DAU/MAU / feature adoption rates / API error rates)
Notes: Single JSON object from usage data API. Contains quantitative metrics compared against tier benchmarks in analyse_health.

Derived From (scope step Output column): Scope Step 4 Output: relevant Slack messages from customer channels
Notes: Reducer supports future fan-out. Each thread dict contains message content / timestamp / participants / channel.

Derived From (scope step Output column): Scope Step 6 Output: ticket health score with trend and findings
Notes: JSON structure: {score: str / trend: str / volume_vs_previous_quarter: str / key_issues: [str] / sla_compliance: str / details: str}. Score set to 'Unknown' if upstream tickets field contains error marker.

Derived From (scope step Output column): Scope Step 7 Output: usage health score with trend and findings
Notes: JSON structure: {score: str / trend: str / feature_adoption: str / details: str}. Score set to 'Unknown' if upstream usage_data field contains error marker.

Derived From (scope step Output column): Scope Step 5 Output: sentiment assessment from Slack thread analysis
Notes: JSON structure: {score: str / summary: str / key_threads: [str]}. Assessed qualitatively from thread content — no config thresholds.

Derived From (scope step Output column): HIL checkpoint 1: freeform human corrections / additions / context about the three analyses
Notes: Feedback-as-Context pattern. None on first pass. When present the synthesise action's prompt injects this as additional context. On rework passes analyse_health also reads this to understand prior corrections.

Derived From (scope step Output column): HIL checkpoint 2 (revise path): specific revision instructions for the report
Notes: Written only when report_review_decision = 'revise'. The generate_report action includes these instructions in its prompt on revision passes.

Derived From (scope step Output column): HIL checkpoint 2 (rework path): instructions for re-running the analysis from scratch
Notes: Written only when report_review_decision = 'rework'. All three analyse_health prompts include these instructions as a focus-area section on rework passes.

Derived From (scope step Output column): HIL checkpoint 2: structured decision determining flow routing
Notes: Constrained values: 'approved' | 'revise' | 'rework'. The routing function reads this field and returns the target action. An error is raised on unrecognised values to prevent silent misrouting.

Derived From (scope step Output column): Scope Step 8 Output: identified risks with severity and mitigation
Notes: Each dict: {risk: str / severity: str / evidence: str / mitigation: str}. Derived from cross-referencing all three analyses plus CRM contract context.

Derived From (scope step Output column): Scope Step 8 Output: identified expansion opportunities with evidence
Notes: Each dict: {opportunity: str / evidence: str / next_step: str}. Derived from usage trends and contract context.

Derived From (scope step Output column): Scope Step 9 Output: overall account health rating
Notes: Constrained values: 'Green' / 'Amber' / 'Red'. Derived from the health_scoring section of the scoring rubric config applied to analysis outputs.

Derived From (scope step Output column): Scope Step 9 Output: narrative explanation supporting the health score
Notes: Free-text justification citing evidence from each analysis dimension. Included in the report's Health Score section.

Derived From (scope step Output column): Scope Step 10 Output: the full structured health report
Notes: Markdown with seven sections: Account Overview / Ticket Health / Product Engagement / Sentiment / Risks & Opportunities / Health Score / Recommended Actions. Can be converted to other formats downstream.

Derived From (scope step Output column): Scope Step 11 Output: 3-5 sentence executive summary of the report
Notes: Plain text summary generated from the completed report_markdown. The LLM receives report_markdown as input to produce this.
